> RSA 2026 · Moscone Center · March 23-26

---

## Category
**Cluster:** Zero Trust Architecture

---

## Product Brief
1. Illumio stops breaches and ransomware from spreading across hybrid attack surfaces.
2. Their Zero Trust Segmentation (ZTS) platform visualizes traffic flows and sets granular segmentation policies.
3. Illumio provides unified visibility and network controls, outperforming traditional firewalls with workload-based segmentation.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Illumio is delivering new enhancements to Illumio Insights, introducing Network Posture to expand how lateral movement risk is exposed and mitigated.
- Illumio's AI security graph now provides system-wide, real-time visibility across hybrid, multi-cloud, and OT environments, surfacing end-to-end attack paths.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How do the new enhancements to Illumio Insights and Network Posture specifically help in mitigating lateral movement risk?
- [ ] Can you elaborate on how Illumio's AI security graph provides real-time visibility and surfaces end-to-end attack paths across hybrid, multi-cloud, and OT environments?
- [ ] What are the key differentiators of Illumio's Zero Trust Segmentation platform compared to other microsegmentation solutions in achieving cyber resilience?
